title: Margaret Daffin
compiled_truth: Margaret Daffin is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-01-07 to 2001-11-30), Margaret Daffin sent 29 and received 84 emails, totalling 113 interactions. Top correspondents: [Vince Kaminski](people/vince-kaminski) (9), [Jane Allen](people/jane-allen) (8), [Michelle Cash](people/michelle-cash) (6), [Molly Magee](people/molly-magee) (6), [Bobbi Tessandori](people/bobbi-tessandori) (5).
